title: Seasonal influenza vaccine uptake in frontline healthcare workers: monthly data 2025 to 2026
body: "Help us improve this resource by taking our user survey.  Previous season’s monthly data and annual reports are available.  Our statistical practice is regulated by the Office for Statistics Regulation (OSR). The OSR sets the standards of trustworthiness, quality and value in the Code of Practice for Statistics that all producers of official statistics should adhere to.  Provisional monthly uptake data for seasonal influenza and COVID-19 vaccines for frontline HCWs working in trusts, independent sector healthcare providers (ISHCPs), and GP practices in England.  Data is presented at national, NHS regional and individual trust levels.  View the pre-release access list for these reports.  "
